content: Ingredients 1 pound ground chicken ½ teaspoon salt ½ teaspoon pepper ¼ teaspoon garlic powder ¼ teaspoon smoked paprika 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce Hamburget Buns Instructions Preheat the air fryer to 350°F (180°C). Add the ground chicken, salt, pepper, garlic powder, smoked paprika, olive oil, and Worcestershire sauce to a mixing bowl and mix well. Using lightly wet hands, shape the mixture into four equal-sized patties. Add the chicken patties to a greased air fryer basket and air fry for 13 minutes, flipping halfway through or until they reach an internal temperature of 160°F. Let the patties rest for 5 minutes before serving. Notes Ground chicken: I prefer lean, but 80/20 also works. Leftovers: Keep in the fridge for up to 4 days (covered) or in the freezer for up to 3 months. Freezing uncooked patties: Separate each patty with parchment paper and keep in the freezer for 3 months. Reheating: Pop the thawed or frozen patties back in the air fryer and reheat at 375°F for 5 to 8 minutes or until they’re warmed through.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 pound ground chicken
  • ½ teaspoon salt
  • ½ teaspoon pepper
  • ¼ teaspoon garlic powder
  • ¼ teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce
  • Hamburget Buns

Instructions

  1. Preheat the air fryer to 350°F (180°C).
  2. Add the ground chicken, salt, pepper, garlic powder, smoked paprika, olive oil, and Worcestershire sauce to a mixing bowl and mix well.
  3. Using lightly wet hands, shape the mixture into four equal-sized patties.
  4. Add the chicken patties to a greased air fryer basket and air fry for 13 minutes, flipping halfway through or until they reach an internal temperature of 160°F.
  5. Let the patties rest for 5 minutes before serving.

Notes

  • Ground chicken: I prefer lean, but 80/20 also works.
  • Leftovers: Keep in the fridge for up to 4 days (covered) or in the freezer for up to 3 months.
  • Freezing uncooked patties: Separate each patty with parchment paper and keep in the freezer for 3 months.
  • Reheating: Pop the thawed or frozen patties back in the air fryer and reheat at 375°F for 5 to 8 minutes or until they’re warmed through.
title: Chicken Patties

content: Ingredients 12 ounces elbow macaroni 1 cup cottage cheese 1½ cups shredded cheddar cheese ½ cup unflavored protein powder (optional) 1 cup milk (non-fat works well) 1 tablespoon cornstarch ½ teaspoon salt ½ teaspoon pepper Instructions Cook the elbow macaroni as per package instructions. Set aside. In a high speed blender, combine the cottage cheese, shredded cheese, milk, protein powder, and cornstarch and blend until smooth. Add the sauce to a saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a boil. Once it begins to simmer, slowly stir the sauce until it thickens. Add the pasta back into the sauce until coated. Serve immediately. Notes Protein powder: I had success with unflavored casein (Optimum Nutrition) and unflavored whey protein powder (Dymatize). Leftovers: Keep in the fridge for up to 5 days or the freezer for up to 6 months.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 12 ounces elbow macaroni
  • 1 cup cottage cheese
  • 1½ cups shredded cheddar cheese
  • ½ cup unflavored protein powder (optional)
  • 1 cup milk (non-fat works well)
  • 1 tablespoon cornstarch
  • ½ teaspoon salt
  • ½ teaspoon pepper

Instructions

  1. Cook the elbow macaroni as per package instructions. Set aside.
  2. In a high speed blender, combine the cottage cheese, shredded cheese, milk, protein powder, and cornstarch and blend until smooth.
  3. Add the sauce to a saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a boil. Once it begins to simmer, slowly stir the sauce until it thickens.
  4. Add the pasta back into the sauce until coated. Serve immediately.

Notes

  • Protein powder: I had success with unflavored casein (Optimum Nutrition) and unflavored whey protein powder (Dymatize).
  • Leftovers: Keep in the fridge for up to 5 days or the freezer for up to 6 months.
title: Mac and Cheese

content: Ingredients 1 pound lean ground turkey ½ teaspoon salt ½ teaspoon pepper ¼ teaspoon garlic powder ¼ teaspoon smoked paprika 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce 1 tablespoon parsley, finely chopped Instructions Preheat the air fryer to 350°F (180°C). In a large bowl, add the ground turkey, salt, pepper, garlic powder, smoked paprika, olive oil, parsley, and Worcestershire sauce. Mix everything together until just combined. Lightly wet your hands and shape the mixture into four turkey burger patties. Press down in the center of each patty. Add the turkey burgers to a greased air fryer basket and air fry for 12 minutes, flipping halfway through. Once the burgers reach an internal temperature of 165°F, remove them from the air fryer. Let the burgers rest for a minute or two before assembling. Notes To store: Keep leftovers in the refrigerator, covered, for up to five days. To freeze: Place the cooked and cooled burgers in a shallow container and store in the freezer for up to 6 months. To reheat: Reheat turkey burgers in the air fryer for 4 to 5 minutes. Other ground meat: Ground chicken and ground beef will work the same.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 pound lean ground turkey
  • ½ teaspoon salt
  • ½ teaspoon pepper
  • ¼ teaspoon garlic powder
  • ¼ teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce
  • 1 tablespoon parsley, finely chopped

Instructions

  1. Preheat the air fryer to 350°F (180°C).
  2. In a large bowl, add the ground turkey, salt, pepper, garlic powder, smoked paprika, olive oil, parsley, and Worcestershire sauce. Mix everything together until just combined.
  3. Lightly wet your hands and shape the mixture into four turkey burger patties. Press down in the center of each patty.
  4. Add the turkey burgers to a greased air fryer basket and air fry for 12 minutes, flipping halfway through. Once the burgers reach an internal temperature of 165°F, remove them from the air fryer.
  5. Let the burgers rest for a minute or two before assembling.

Notes

  • To store: Keep leftovers in the refrigerator, covered, for up to five days.
  • To freeze: Place the cooked and cooled burgers in a shallow container and store in the freezer for up to 6 months.
  • To reheat: Reheat turkey burgers in the air fryer for 4 to 5 minutes.
  • Other ground meat: Ground chicken and ground beef will work the same.
title: Turkey Burgers

content: Instructions Line baking sheet with aluminum foil. Place bacon on aluminum foil. Bake at 400° for at least 15 minutes until brown. Remove bacon from pan. Let grease cool on aluminum foil then throw away.
summary:
Instructions

Line baking sheet with aluminum foil. Place bacon on aluminum foil. Bake at 400° for at least 15 minutes until brown. Remove bacon from pan. Let grease cool on aluminum foil then throw away.
title: Bacon

content: Ingredients 1 lb chicken (breast or tenderloins) ½ Cup Panko breadcrumbs (add seasoning if desired) 2 T butter, melted Instructions Pound chicken. Cut chicken into strips or nuggets. Melt butter. Dip chicken in melted butter then dip in breadcrumbs. Place chicken on baking sheet and bake at 450° for 5 minutes (5 minutes for nuggets, longer for strips). Flip chicken. Bake an additional 5 minutes.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb chicken (breast or tenderloins)
  • ½ Cup Panko breadcrumbs (add seasoning if desired)
  • 2 T butter, melted

Instructions

Pound chicken. Cut chicken into strips or nuggets. Melt butter. Dip chicken in melted butter then dip in breadcrumbs. Place chicken on baking sheet and bake at 450° for 5 minutes (5 minutes for nuggets, longer for strips). Flip chicken. Bake an additional 5 minutes.
title: Baked Chicken

content:
Ingredients 1 lb ground beef 2-10 oz cans red enchilada sauce (2 hot or 1 hot, 1 mild) 1-4 oz can chopped green chiles Beans (optional) 8 flour tortillas (fajita size) 2+ cups cheddar cheese Pepper + onions Sour cream (for serving) Tortilla chips (for serving) Instructions Brown ground beef. Drain. Stir in ½ cup of enchilada sauce and green chiles. Simmer for 2–3 minutes. Spread ½ cup enchilada sauce in bottom of 13x9" pan. Spread ¼ cup beef mixture down center of each tortilla, spread beans, sprinkle with cheese. Wrap tortilla tightly around filling, placing seam down in baking pan. Top with remaining enchilada sauce. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
Bake 10–15 minutes at 375° until bubbly.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb ground beef
  • 2-10 oz cans red enchilada sauce (2 hot or 1 hot, 1 mild)
  • 1-4 oz can chopped green chiles
  • Beans (optional)
  • 8 flour tortillas (fajita size)
  • 2+ cups cheddar cheese
  • Pepper + onions
  • Sour cream (for serving)
  • Tortilla chips (for serving)

Instructions

Brown ground beef. Drain. Stir in ½ cup of enchilada sauce and green chiles. Simmer for 2–3 minutes. Spread ½ cup enchilada sauce in bottom of 13x9" pan. Spread ¼ cup beef mixture down center of each tortilla, spread beans, sprinkle with cheese. Wrap tortilla tightly around filling, placing seam down in baking pan. Top with remaining enchilada sauce. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
title: Beef Enchiladas

content:
Ingredients 6 eggs 3 tablespoons of mayonnaise ½ teaspoon ground mustard or small regular mustard ⅛ teaspoon salt ⅛ teaspoon pepper Instructions Boiled Eggs Put eggs in a saucepan. Completely cover eggs with cold water. Heat on high until boiling. Once rolling boil, remove pan from heat and cover. Let stand for 15 minutes. After, add cold water to cool eggs off. Once eggs are cool, peel.
Deviled Eggs Once eggs are peeled, cut lengthwise in half. Take out yolks and put them into a small bowl. Mash yolk with a fork. Stir mayonnaise, mustard, salt, and pepper into yolks. Fill whites with the egg yolk mixture.
Air Fryer Boiled Eggs Cook at 270° for 15 minutes. Cool immediately after cooking. Keep in fridge up to 7 days.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 6 eggs
  • 3 tablespoons of mayonnaise
  • ½ teaspoon ground mustard or small regular mustard
  • ⅛ teaspoon salt
  • ⅛ teaspoon pepper

Instructions

Boiled Eggs

Put eggs in a saucepan. Completely cover eggs with cold water. Heat on high until boiling. Once rolling boil, remove pan from heat and cover. Let stand for 15 minutes. After, add cold water to cool eggs off. Once eggs are cool, peel.

Deviled Eggs

Once eggs are peeled, cut lengthwise in half. Take out yolks and put them into a small bowl. Mash yolk with a fork. Stir mayonnaise, mustard, salt, and pepper into yolks. Fill whites with the egg yolk mixture.
title: Boiled and Deviled Eggs

content: Ingredients 4 eggs, beaten Salt & pepper to taste ⅓ cup diced ham, crumbled bacon or sausage Mushrooms, chopped Onion, chopped 1 cup cheddar cheese or colby-jack cheese 4 flour tortillas (taco or fajita size) Salsa Sour cream Cooking spray Instructions In large skillet scramble eggs, add salt & pepper to taste. Add meat, mushrooms, onion. Put ¼ of egg mixture and ¼ cup cheese on half of each tortilla and fold over. Spray skillet with cooking spray. Place quesadillas in skillet and cook over medium heat until golden brown. Flip and cook until other side is brown. Serve with salsa & sour cream.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 4 eggs, beaten
  • Salt & pepper to taste
  • ⅓ cup diced ham, crumbled bacon or sausage
  • Mushrooms, chopped
  • Onion, chopped
  • 1 cup cheddar cheese or colby-jack cheese
  • 4 flour tortillas (taco or fajita size)
  • Salsa
  • Sour cream
  • Cooking spray

Instructions

In large skillet scramble eggs, add salt & pepper to taste. Add meat, mushrooms, onion. Put ¼ of egg mixture and ¼ cup cheese on half of each tortilla and fold over. Spray skillet with cooking spray. Place quesadillas in skillet and cook over medium heat until golden brown. Flip and cook until other side is brown. Serve with salsa & sour cream.
title: Breakfast Quesadillas

content:
Ingredients 1 lb chicken breast or tenderloin ¾ cup seasoned bread crumbs ¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese 2 T butter, melted (or olive oil) ¾ cup mozzarella cheese 1 cup spaghetti sauce Cooking spray Spaghetti noodles Instructions Pound chicken. Melt butter in bowl. Combine breadcrumbs and parmesan cheese in another bowl. Dip chicken in butter then heavily dip in breadcrumbs. Place chicken on baking sheet. Spray top of chicken with cooking spray. Bake in 450° oven for 25 minutes, flipping chicken halfway. Spoon spaghetti sauce over chicken. Top with mozzarella cheese. Bake 5 more minutes until cheese is melted.
Note: Watch time to cook chicken.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb chicken breast or tenderloin
  • ¾ cup seasoned bread crumbs
  • ¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 T butter, melted (or olive oil)
  • ¾ cup mozzarella cheese
  • 1 cup spaghetti sauce
  • Cooking spray
  • Spaghetti noodles

Instructions

Pound chicken. Melt butter in bowl. Combine breadcrumbs and parmesan cheese in another bowl. Dip chicken in butter then heavily dip in breadcrumbs. Place chicken on baking sheet. Spray top of chicken with cooking spray. Bake in 450° oven for 25 minutes, flipping chicken halfway. Spoon spaghetti sauce over chicken. Top with mozzarella cheese. Bake 5 more minutes until cheese is melted.
title: Chicken Parmesan

content: Ingredients 1 lb ground beef 2 tsp onion powder ¼ tsp garlic powder Salt & pepper to taste Tomato sauce (29 ounces) Chili beans (40 ounces) (Brooks hot chili beans) Cheddar cheese (for serving) Elbow noodles (optional) Pepper (optional) Instructions Brown ground beef. Add onion powder, garlic powder, salt & pepper, tomato sauce, beans. Bring to a boil. Cover. Simmer for 1 hour. Serve with cheddar cheese.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb ground beef
  • 2 tsp onion powder
  • ¼ tsp garlic powder
  • Salt & pepper to taste
  • Tomato sauce (29 ounces)
  • Chili beans (40 ounces) (Brooks hot chili beans)
  • Cheddar cheese (for serving)
  • Elbow noodles (optional)
  • Pepper (optional)

Instructions

Brown ground beef. Add onion powder, garlic powder, salt & pepper, tomato sauce, beans. Bring to a boil. Cover. Simmer for 1 hour. Serve with cheddar cheese.
title: Chili

content: Ingredients Hot dogs Hot dog buns 10 oz Hormel No Beans Chili Shredded cheddar cheese Instructions Boil hot dogs as directed. Heat no beans chili until heated through. Place hot dog on bun, add chili, cheese. Cook at 425° until cheese is melted.
summary:
Ingredients

  • Hot dogs
  • Hot dog buns
  • 10 oz Hormel No Beans Chili
  • Shredded cheddar cheese

Instructions

Boil hot dogs as directed. Heat no beans chili until heated through. Place hot dog on bun, add chili, cheese. Cook at 425° until cheese is melted.
title: Chili Dogs

content: Ingredients 1 lb chicken (breast or tenderloins) 1-10 oz can Campbell’s cream of chicken soup Instructions Brown chicken. Add soup and 1 can of water using the soup can. Bring to a boil. Cover. Simmer for at least 30 minutes.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb chicken (breast or tenderloins)
  • 1-10 oz can Campbell’s cream of chicken soup

Instructions

Brown chicken. Add soup and 1 can of water using the soup can. Bring to a boil. Cover. Simmer for at least 30 minutes.
title: Creamed Chicken

content:
Ingredients 1 lb lean (at least 80%) ground beef 1 can (15 to 16 oz) spicy chili beans in sauce, undrained 1 cup salsa 2 cups coarsely broken tortilla chips ¾ cup sour cream 4 medium green onions, sliced (¼ cup) 1 medium tomato, chopped (¾ cup) 1 cup shredded Cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese (4 oz) Tortilla chips, if desired Shredded lettuce, if desired Salsa, if desired Note: Needs more spice or seasoning for beef.
Instructions Heat oven to 350°F. In 10-inch skillet, cook beef over medium heat 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until brown; drain. Stir in beans and 1 cup salsa. Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally.
In ungreased 2-quart casserole, place broken tortilla chips. Top with beef mixture. Spread with sour cream. Sprinkle with onions, tomato and cheese.
Bake uncovered 20 to 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Arrange tortilla chips around edge of casserole. Serve with lettuce and salsa.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb lean (at least 80%) ground beef
  • 1 can (15 to 16 oz) spicy chili beans in sauce, undrained
  • 1 cup salsa
  • 2 cups coarsely broken tortilla chips
  • ¾ cup sour cream
  • 4 medium green onions, sliced (¼ cup)
  • 1 medium tomato, chopped (¾ cup)
  • 1 cup shredded Cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese (4 oz)
  • Tortilla chips, if desired
  • Shredded lettuce, if desired
  • Salsa, if desired

Note: Needs more spice or seasoning for beef.
title: Fiesta Taco Casserole

content:
Ingredients 1 Cup white sugar 1 Cup brown sugar 1 Cup unsalted butter (2 sticks of butter - softened) 2 large eggs 1 tsp Baking soda 2 tsp Vanilla extract 2 tsp Hot water ½ tsp Salt 3 Cups all-purpose flour ¾ Cup semi-sweet chocolate chips ¾ Cup peanut butter chips 1 cup chopped walnuts Instructions Add both the white sugar and brown sugar to your mixer bowl. Make sure you use a large enough bowl.
Cream together the butter and sugar mixture with your mixer at low speed until fairly smooth. Add eggs into mixture 1 at a time, mixing for 10-15 seconds each. Stir in Vanilla while mixing. Dissolve baking soda with hot water. Stir in baking soda mixture with a spoon. While mixing, sprinkle in salt.
Stir in flour, half a cup at a time with mixer on medium speed. Stir in chocolate chips, walnuts, and peanut butter chips half a cup at a time.
(Optional) If you like flatter cookies, preheat the oven temperature immediately to 350°F. If you like rounder cookies, wait to start preheating oven until you’ve chilled the dough for half an hour (cover the bowl with plastic wrap and chill in the fridge for 45 minutes).
Use a tablespoon to scoop rounded dough balls onto ungreased pan or a parchment lined pan. Bake cookies for 13 minutes at 350°.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 Cup white sugar
  • 1 Cup brown sugar
  • 1 Cup unsalted butter (2 sticks of butter - softened)
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 tsp Baking soda
  • 2 tsp Vanilla extract
  • 2 tsp Hot water
  • ½ tsp Salt
  • 3 Cups all-purpose flour
  • ¾ Cup semi-sweet chocolate chips
  • ¾ Cup peanut butter chips
  • 1 cup chopped walnuts

Instructions

Add both the white sugar and brown sugar to your mixer bowl. Make sure you use a large enough bowl.
title: Fred's Chocolate Chip Cookies

content: Ingredients Bread (plain or cinnamon) 4 eggs Cinnamon (if not using cinnamon bread) ½ cup milk Cooking spray Syrup Instructions Cut bread slices in half. With fork stir eggs, milk and cinnamon. Whisk with fork to add air to egg mixture. Spray flat pan with cooking spray. Heat on medium-high heat. Dip bread slices in egg mixture. Place on flat pan. Cook until brown. Flip with spatula and brown other side.
summary:
Ingredients

  • Bread (plain or cinnamon)
  • 4 eggs
  • Cinnamon (if not using cinnamon bread)
  • ½ cup milk
  • Cooking spray
  • Syrup

Instructions

Cut bread slices in half. With fork stir eggs, milk and cinnamon. Whisk with fork to add air to egg mixture. Spray flat pan with cooking spray. Heat on medium-high heat. Dip bread slices in egg mixture. Place on flat pan. Cook until brown. Flip with spatula and brown other side.
title: French Toast

content:
Ingredients 12 eggs 3 tablespoons full-fat dairy (heavy cream, half-and-half, whole milk, sour cream, crème fraîche or yogurt) ½ teaspoon salt 1 cup (4 ounces) grated or crumbled cheddar cheese 3 to 5 cups chopped vegetables (mushrooms, peppers, spinach, onion, tomato) 1 tablespoon olive oil Garnish: Chopped or torn fresh, leafy herbs (basil, parsley, cilantro, or dill) Instructions Preheat the oven to 425°F for the traditional stovetop method, or 350°F for the baked methods.
Crack the eggs into a medium mixing bowl. Add your dairy of choice and the salt. Whisk just until the egg yolks and whites are blended. Whisk in all or half of the cheese (you can reserve the other half for topping the frittata before baking, if desired). Set the mixture aside.
In a 12-inch cast iron skillet (or any other large skillet that’s oven safe), warm the olive oil over medium heat until shimmering. Add the vegetables, starting with chopped onions or other dense vegetables. Cook for a few minutes, stirring occasionally, then add any softer vegetables such as zucchini. Cook until those vegetables are tender, then add any garlic or greens, and cook until fragrant or wilted. Season with salt, to taste.
Traditional Stovetop Option Whisk the eggs once more and pour the mixture over the vegetables. Stir with a spatula briefly to combine and distribute the mixture evenly across the pan. If you reserved any cheese, sprinkle it on top of the frittata now.
Once the outside edge of the frittata turns lighter in color (about 30 seconds to 1 minute), carefully transfer the frittata to the oven. Bake for 7 to 14 minutes (keep an eye on it), until the eggs are puffed and appear cooked, and the center of the frittata jiggles just a bit when you give it a gentle shimmy. Remove the frittata from the oven and place it on a cooling rack to cool. Garnish with herbs, slice with a sharp knife, and serve.
Baked Casserole Option Let the cooked vegetables cool for a few minutes. In the meantime, grease a 9 by 13-inch pan with butter, which works better than cooking spray. Stir the lightly cooled veggies into the egg mixture, then pour it all into the pan. If you reserved any cheese, sprinkle it on top of the frittata now.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes (keep an eye on it), until the eggs are puffed and appear cooked, and the center of the frittata jiggles just a bit when you give it a gentle shimmy. Remove the frittata from the oven and place it on a cooling rack to cool. Garnish with herbs, slice with a sharp knife, and serve.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 12 eggs
  • 3 tablespoons full-fat dairy (heavy cream, half-and-half, whole milk, sour cream, crème fraîche or yogurt)
  • ½ teaspoon salt
  • 1 cup (4 ounces) grated or crumbled cheddar cheese
  • 3 to 5 cups chopped vegetables (mushrooms, peppers, spinach, onion, tomato)
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • Garnish: Chopped or torn fresh, leafy herbs (basil, parsley, cilantro, or dill)

Instructions

Preheat the oven to 425°F for the traditional stovetop method, or 350°F for the baked methods.
title: Frittatas

content:
Ingredients Ground beef (1 lb for Sloppy Joe / ½ lb for Goulash) 1 lb elbow noodles 8 pack of hamburger buns 2-10 oz cans tomato soup (or 1-23 oz can) 1 teaspoon onion powder Salt & pepper (to taste) 2 Tablespoons sugar 2 Tablespoons white vinegar 3 squirts of ketchup Instructions Prepare elbow noodles as directed. Brown ground beef. Add onion powder, salt & pepper. Drain. Add tomato soup plus 1 can of water per can of soup. Add sugar, vinegar, sugar, ketchup. Bring to a low boil. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes. Remove cover and simmer for a few minutes to thicken.
Note: For Sloppy Joe, serve on hamburger buns. For Goulash, mix with elbow noodles.
summary:
Ingredients

  • Ground beef (1 lb for Sloppy Joe / ½ lb for Goulash)
  • 1 lb elbow noodles
  • 8 pack of hamburger buns
  • 2-10 oz cans tomato soup (or 1-23 oz can)
  • 1 teaspoon onion powder
  • Salt & pepper (to taste)
  • 2 Tablespoons sugar
  • 2 Tablespoons white vinegar
  • 3 squirts of ketchup

Instructions

Prepare elbow noodles as directed. Brown ground beef. Add onion powder, salt & pepper. Drain. Add tomato soup plus 1 can of water per can of soup. Add sugar, vinegar, sugar, ketchup. Bring to a low boil. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes. Remove cover and simmer for a few minutes to thicken.
title: Goulash / Sloppy Joe

content: Ingredients Pillsbury thin pizza crust 1-14oz can pizza sauce Toppings (pepperoni, ham, mushrooms, pepper) 8 ozs (2 cups) shredded mozzarella cheese Instructions Place pizza dough on cookie sheet, spread to edges. Cut off any excess dough. Pre-bake dough at 350° for 5 minutes. Add pizza sauce, any desired toppings, cheese. Bake at 350° until cheese is melted, approximately 15 minutes.
summary:
Ingredients

  • Pillsbury thin pizza crust
  • 1-14oz can pizza sauce
  • Toppings (pepperoni, ham, mushrooms, pepper)
  • 8 ozs (2 cups) shredded mozzarella cheese

Instructions

Place pizza dough on cookie sheet, spread to edges. Cut off any excess dough. Pre-bake dough at 350° for 5 minutes. Add pizza sauce, any desired toppings, cheese. Bake at 350° until cheese is melted, approximately 15 minutes.
title: Homemade Pizza

content:
Ingredients 1 lb uncooked lasagna noodles (for 3 layers) 1 lb ground beef (or less) 2 teaspoons onion powder ½ teaspoon garlic powder 2 Tablespoons minced parsley 1½ Tablespoon oregano 1-1/2 teaspoons salt ½ teaspoon black pepper (1) 12 oz can tomato paste (or (2) 6 oz cans) 8 ozs (2 cups) grated mozzarella cheese 8 ozs (2 cups) grated sharp cheddar cheese ¾ cup parmesan cheese Instructions Boil noodles as directed on box. Add oil so noodles don’t stick together. Drain. Cool.
Grate mozzarella cheese and sharp cheddar cheese and mix with parmesan cheese in a bowl.
Brown beef. Then add onion powder, garlic powder, parsley, oregano, salt & pepper to beef and stir until combined. Add tomato paste to beef mixture with 3 cans of water using tomato paste can. Bring to a low boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
In 13"x9" metal pan cover bottom of pan with meat sauce, then layer of noodles, layer of meat sauce, layer of cheese, layer of noodles, layer of meat sauce, layer of cheese, layer of noodles, layer of sauce, layer of cheese (3 total layers of noodles).
Cover pan with aluminum foil and bake at 350° for 20 minutes. Remove aluminum foil and bake until top is lightly brown and sauce bubbles up from the sides, around 10 minutes.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb uncooked lasagna noodles (for 3 layers)
  • 1 lb ground beef (or less)
  • 2 teaspoons onion powder
  • ½ teaspoon garlic powder
  • 2 Tablespoons minced parsley
  • 1½ Tablespoon oregano
  • 1-1/2 teaspoons salt
  • ½ teaspoon black pepper
  • (1) 12 oz can tomato paste (or (2) 6 oz cans)
  • 8 ozs (2 cups) grated mozzarella cheese
  • 8 ozs (2 cups) grated sharp cheddar cheese
  • ¾ cup parmesan cheese

Instructions

Boil noodles as directed on box. Add oil so noodles don’t stick together. Drain. Cool.
title: Lasagna

content:
Ingredients 3 pounds russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-1/2" pieces ¾ cup milk 4 tablespoons butter, melted 1 cup sour cream Salt & pepper to taste 1-2/3 cups cheddar cheese, shredded ½ cup bacon (finely crumbled) Cooking spray Chopped chives, optional Chopped parsley, optional Instructions Boil potatoes with 2 tablespoons salt for 15–20 minutes until tender. Drain potatoes. Mash potatoes with mixer. Stir in milk, butter, sour cream, salt & pepper. Stir in 1 cup cheddar cheese.
Spray 9" glass baking dish with cooking spray. Add potatoes. Top with remaining 2/3 cup cheddar cheese. Cover with aluminum foil.
Refrigerate for next day use or bake at 350° for 20 minutes. Remove foil. Add bacon. Bake, uncovered, for additional 20 minutes or until cheese is bubbly. Sprinkle with chives and parsley, if desired.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 3 pounds russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-1/2" pieces
  • ¾ cup milk
  • 4 tablespoons butter, melted
  • 1 cup sour cream
  • Salt & pepper to taste
  • 1-2/3 cups cheddar cheese, shredded
  • ½ cup bacon (finely crumbled)
  • Cooking spray
  • Chopped chives, optional
  • Chopped parsley, optional

Instructions

Boil potatoes with 2 tablespoons salt for 15–20 minutes until tender. Drain potatoes. Mash potatoes with mixer. Stir in milk, butter, sour cream, salt & pepper. Stir in 1 cup cheddar cheese.
title: Loaded Mashed Potato Casserole

content:
Ingredients 1 lb ground beef ⅓ cup Progresso Italian style bread crumbs 1 egg ½ tsp salt (or ½ tsp garlic) ½ tsp pepper 1 tsp Mrs. Dash seasoning (Italian or Garlic & Herbs) ⅓ cup parmesan cheese 1-24 oz Prego spaghetti sauce Cooking spray Note: If using green pepper, put it in sauce to cook instead of sauté.
Instructions Add bread crumbs to ground beef mix with a few sprinkles of water to help hold together and roll into meatballs.
Coat 9"x9" baking pan with cooking spray, add meatballs. Cook at 325° for 15 minutes. Flip meatballs over and cook for an additional 15 minutes. Remove meatballs from pan and add to spaghetti sauce in saucepan. Bring to a boil. Cover and simmer for 2–3 hours.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb ground beef
  • ⅓ cup Progresso Italian style bread crumbs
  • 1 egg
  • ½ tsp salt (or ½ tsp garlic)
  • ½ tsp pepper
  • 1 tsp Mrs. Dash seasoning (Italian or Garlic & Herbs)
  • ⅓ cup parmesan cheese
  • 1-24 oz Prego spaghetti sauce
  • Cooking spray

Note: If using green pepper, put it in sauce to cook instead of sauté.

Instructions

Add bread crumbs to ground beef mix with a few sprinkles of water to help hold together and roll into meatballs.
title: Meatballs

content: Ingredients 1 lb ground beef ½ cup bread crumbs 1 egg 1 tsp onion powder Salt & Pepper (to taste) Splash of milk Squirt of ketchup Cooking spray Instructions Mix all ingredients together in bowl with hands. Add more bread crumbs or milk for desired consistency. Spray loaf pan with cooking spray. Press meat mixture into loaf pan (or form into a rectangle on baking sheet). Cover with aluminum foil and bake at 350° for 30 minutes. Remove aluminum foil and cook for 30 minutes longer or until no longer pink in the middle and brown on top.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb ground beef
  • ½ cup bread crumbs
  • 1 egg
  • 1 tsp onion powder
  • Salt & Pepper (to taste)
  • Splash of milk
  • Squirt of ketchup
  • Cooking spray

Instructions

Mix all ingredients together in bowl with hands. Add more bread crumbs or milk for desired consistency. Spray loaf pan with cooking spray. Press meat mixture into loaf pan (or form into a rectangle on baking sheet). Cover with aluminum foil and bake at 350° for 30 minutes. Remove aluminum foil and cook for 30 minutes longer or until no longer pink in the middle and brown on top.
title: Meatloaf

content: Ingredients 1-2 burrito size tortilla shells 1 lb ground beef 1-10 oz can hot enchilada sauce 1-16 oz can refried beans 1 medium onion, chopped (or green onion) 2 cups (8 oz) shredded colby-jack cheese Instructions Brown ground beef. Add enchilada sauce to ground beef and heat until boiling. Heat refried beans in microwave or on stovetop. On baking sheet place tortilla shells. Spread refried beans on tortilla shells. Layer on ground beef mixture. Layer onions, layer cheese. Bake at 425° for 5–7 minutes or until cheese is melted.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1-2 burrito size tortilla shells
  • 1 lb ground beef
  • 1-10 oz can hot enchilada sauce
  • 1-16 oz can refried beans
  • 1 medium onion, chopped (or green onion)
  • 2 cups (8 oz) shredded colby-jack cheese

Instructions

Brown ground beef. Add enchilada sauce to ground beef and heat until boiling. Heat refried beans in microwave or on stovetop. On baking sheet place tortilla shells. Spread refried beans on tortilla shells. Layer on ground beef mixture. Layer onions, layer cheese. Bake at 425° for 5–7 minutes or until cheese is melted.
title: Mexican Pizza

content: Ingredients 1 lb penne noodles ½ lb ground beef 1-24 oz Prego sauce 8 ozs (2 cups) shredded mozzarella cheese Red and/or green peppers, chopped (optional) Pepper, onion (optional) Instructions Cook noodles as directed. Drain. Brown ground beef. Drain beef, if necessary. Add peppers, if desired, to beef mixture and cook for several minutes. Place ground beef mixture in large bowl. Add cheese to ground beef mixture and mix together. Add sauce to beef mixture and mix together. Add noodles to desired consistency. Put in 8"x8" baking pan (or 9x13 pan if using all noodles). Cover baking pan with aluminum foil. Bake at 350° for 30 minutes. Remove aluminum foil from top of baking pan. Stir and bake until bubbly around 10 minutes.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb penne noodles
  • ½ lb ground beef
  • 1-24 oz Prego sauce
  • 8 ozs (2 cups) shredded mozzarella cheese
  • Red and/or green peppers, chopped (optional)
  • Pepper, onion (optional)

Instructions

Cook noodles as directed. Drain. Brown ground beef. Drain beef, if necessary. Add peppers, if desired, to beef mixture and cook for several minutes. Place ground beef mixture in large bowl. Add cheese to ground beef mixture and mix together. Add sauce to beef mixture and mix together. Add noodles to desired consistency. Put in 8"x8" baking pan (or 9x13 pan if using all noodles). Cover baking pan with aluminum foil. Bake at 350° for 30 minutes. Remove aluminum foil from top of baking pan. Stir and bake until bubbly around 10 minutes.
title: Mostaccioli

content: Ingredients 1 cup old-fashioned oats ⅔ cup toasted (350° for 5 minutes) shredded coconut (sweetened or unsweetened) ½ cup creamy peanut butter ½ cup ground flaxseed ½ cup semisweet mini chocolate chips (or vegan chocolate chips) ⅓ cup honey 1 T chia seeds (optional) 1 t vanilla extract Instructions Stir all ingredients together in large mixing bowl until thoroughly combined. Cover and chill in refrigerator for 1–2 hours. Make mixture into balls (or press mixture into square baking dish). Refrigerate in sealed container for up to 1 week.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 cup old-fashioned oats
  • ⅔ cup toasted (350° for 5 minutes) shredded coconut (sweetened or unsweetened)
  • ½ cup creamy peanut butter
  • ½ cup ground flaxseed
  • ½ cup semisweet mini chocolate chips (or vegan chocolate chips)
  • ⅓ cup honey
  • 1 T chia seeds (optional)
  • 1 t vanilla extract

Instructions

Stir all ingredients together in large mixing bowl until thoroughly combined. Cover and chill in refrigerator for 1–2 hours. Make mixture into balls (or press mixture into square baking dish). Refrigerate in sealed container for up to 1 week.
title: No Bake Energy Bites

content:
Ingredients ¼ cup butter, cubed ¼ cup flour 2 tsp salt ½ tsp pepper 2½ cup milk 1½ cup shredded Velveeta 6 medium potatoes, thinly sliced Instructions In a large saucepan, melt butter. Whisk the flour, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Gradually add milk bringing it to a boil. Cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened.
Reduce heat, add cheese and cook and stir until all is melted.
Place potatoes in a greased 13x9 baking dish. Pour sauce over potatoes.
Bake uncovered at 350°F for 1 hour or until potatoes are tender.
summary:
Ingredients

  • ¼ cup butter, cubed
  • ¼ cup flour
  • 2 tsp salt
  • ½ tsp pepper
  • 2½ cup milk
  • 1½ cup shredded Velveeta
  • 6 medium potatoes, thinly sliced

Instructions

In a large saucepan, melt butter. Whisk the flour, salt, and pepper until smooth.

Gradually add milk bringing it to a boil. Cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened.

Reduce heat, add cheese and cook and stir until all is melted.
title: Old Fashioned Cheese Potatoes

content: Ingredients 8 hot dogs 8 crescent rolls 4 cheese slices cut in half Instructions With knife slice uncooked hot dogs down the middle to insert ½ slice of cheese. Roll crescent roll around each hot dog. Place on baking sheet. Bake at 350° until cheese is melted and rolls are slightly brown.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 8 hot dogs
  • 8 crescent rolls
  • 4 cheese slices cut in half

Instructions

With knife slice uncooked hot dogs down the middle to insert ½ slice of cheese. Roll crescent roll around each hot dog. Place on baking sheet. Bake at 350° until cheese is melted and rolls are slightly brown.
title: Pigs in a Blanket

content:
Small Red Potatoes Wash and scrub potatoes thoroughly. Only cut super big potatoes so they are all about the same size.
Put potatoes into saucepan with enough water to cover all the potatoes. Heat potatoes until they are boiling. Then reduce heat to simmer and cover potatoes 15 to 20 minutes or until tender.
Baked Potatoes — Russet Potatoes Oven Method Preheat oven to 350°F. Thoroughly scrub and wash the potatoes. Poke potatoes with a fork. Coat the potatoes in vegetable oil and sprinkle a little salt over them. Wrap potatoes in aluminum foil. Put wrapped potatoes in oven for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
Microwave Method Thoroughly scrub and wash the potatoes. Poke potatoes with a fork. Put potato on microwave safe plate and cook for 5 minutes. Potentially have to cook longer; cut up potato into pieces for it to cook faster.
summary:
Small Red Potatoes

Wash and scrub potatoes thoroughly. Only cut super big potatoes so they are all about the same size.

Put potatoes into saucepan with enough water to cover all the potatoes. Heat potatoes until they are boiling. Then reduce heat to simmer and cover potatoes 15 to 20 minutes or until tender.

Baked Potatoes — Russet Potatoes

Oven Method

Preheat oven to 350°F. Thoroughly scrub and wash the potatoes. Poke potatoes with a fork. Coat the potatoes in vegetable oil and sprinkle a little salt over them. Wrap potatoes in aluminum foil. Put wrapped potatoes in oven for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
title: Potatoes

content:
Ingredients 1 lb Ground beef Taco seasoning mix 25% less sodium (1 oz) 6 Flour tortillas (8-10 inches diameter) 1 Small tomato (roma or cherry) chopped (½ cup) 4 Medium green onions or 1 onion Or pico de gallo Black or pinto beans (16 oz) Colby jack or cheddar cheese (2 cups) Type of pepper Lettuce Sour cream Instructions Cut/chop all vegetables appropriately. Brown ground beef with the possibility of putting vegetables in (drain). Add taco seasoning mix according to its directions. Heat up beans separately. Warm up taco shells in the microwave (20 seconds for 2 shells) by using slightly damp paper towels on both sides of taco shells. Ready for regular tacos so assemble meat, vegetables, cheese, lettuce, and beans.
For quesadillas: Set oven to 350°F. Set open faced tortillas on a cookie sheet and spread cheese over half of each tortilla. Top with remaining meat, vegetables, lettuce, and beans. Fold tortilla over the filling. Bake for about 5 minutes in the oven or until the quesadilla is hot and cheese is melted.
For leftovers: Combine meat, vegetables, and beans into a singular bowl to put in the refrigerator. Reheat in the microwave prior to using this mixture for quesadillas.
summary:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb Ground beef
  • Taco seasoning mix 25% less sodium (1 oz)
  • 6 Flour tortillas (8-10 inches diameter)
  • 1 Small tomato (roma or cherry) chopped (½ cup)
  • 4 Medium green onions or 1 onion
  • Or pico de gallo
  • Black or pinto beans (16 oz)
  • Colby jack or cheddar cheese (2 cups)
  • Type of pepper
  • Lettuce
  • Sour cream

Instructions

Cut/chop all vegetables appropriately. Brown ground beef with the possibility of putting vegetables in (drain). Add taco seasoning mix according to its directions. Heat up beans separately. Warm up taco shells in the microwave (20 seconds for 2 shells) by using slightly damp paper towels on both sides of taco shells. Ready for regular tacos so assemble meat, vegetables, cheese, lettuce, and beans.
title: Quesadillas & Tacos

content:
Sauteed Mushrooms Ingredients ½ lb (3 cups) mushrooms, sliced 1 Tablespoon butter ¼ Teaspoon salt ⅛ Teaspoon pepper 1 clove garlic, finely chopped (or ¼ Teaspoon garlic powder) Chopped parsley, if desired Instructions In skillet over medium-high heat melt butter, add garlic, salt & pepper. Add mushrooms. Cook 4–6 minutes until mushrooms are light brown. Sprinkle with parsley.
Caramelized Onions Ingredients Sweet onion, sliced 2 Tablespoons butter ¼ Teaspoon salt Instructions In skillet melt butter over medium-high heat. Add onions and cook for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low. Add salt. Cook an additional 35–40 minutes until onions are deep golden brown.
summary:
Sauteed Mushrooms

Ingredients

  • ½ lb (3 cups) mushrooms, sliced
  • 1 Tablespoon butter
  • ¼ Teaspoon salt
  • ⅛ Teaspoon pepper
  • 1 clove garlic, finely chopped (or ¼ Teaspoon garlic powder)
  • Chopped parsley, if desired

Instructions

In skillet over medium-high heat melt butter, add garlic, salt & pepper. Add mushrooms. Cook 4–6 minutes until mushrooms are light brown. Sprinkle with parsley.

Caramelized Onions

Ingredients

  • Sweet onion, sliced
  • 2 Tablespoons butter
  • ¼ Teaspoon salt

Instructions

In skillet melt butter over medium-high heat. Add onions and cook for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low. Add salt. Cook an additional 35–40 minutes until onions are deep golden brown.
title: Sauteed Mushrooms and Caramelized Onions

content: Ingredients Wide egg noodles 1-10 oz cream of mushroom soup 1-5 oz can tuna in water, drained Splash of milk Salt & Pepper to taste Bread crumbs Instructions Cook egg noodles as directed. Drain. Add soup, tuna, milk, salt & pepper. Bring to a boil then simmer for 5 minutes. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
summary:
Ingredients

  • Wide egg noodles
  • 1-10 oz cream of mushroom soup
  • 1-5 oz can tuna in water, drained
  • Splash of milk
  • Salt & Pepper to taste
  • Bread crumbs

Instructions

Cook egg noodles as directed. Drain. Add soup, tuna, milk, salt & pepper. Bring to a boil then simmer for 5 minutes. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
title: Tuna Casserole
